description: Vulnerability in the Oracle Order Management product of Oracle E-Business Suite (component: Product Diagnostic Tools).  Supported versions that are affected are 12.2.3-12.2.15. Easily exploitable vulnerability allows high privileged attacker with network access via HTTP to compromise Oracle Order Management.  Successful attacks of this vulnerability can result in takeover of Oracle Order Management. CVSS 3.1 Base Score 7.2 (Confidentiality, Integrity and Availability impacts).  CVSS Vector: (CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:H/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:H).
